var SubscriptionLog = (function () { function SubscriptionLog(subscribedFrame, unsubscribedFrame) { if (unsubscribedFrame === void 0) { unsubscribedFrame = Infinity; } this.subscribedFrame = subscribedFrame; this.unsubscribedFrame = unsubscribedFrame; } return SubscriptionLog; }()); export { SubscriptionLog }; //# sourceMappingURL=SubscriptionLog.js.map
